calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Void Judgment [Ccp 473(D)]; Or In The Alternative To Vacate Judgment Based On Extrinsic Fraud
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Goyette, Esq., 916-851-1995 for Plaintiff/opposing party Less & Weaver.
Herman Franck, Esq. 916-447-8400 for Defendant/moving party Kai Hare.

The Court gives hard copies of the tentative ruling to both sides prior to the hearing. Hearing is held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT KAI HARE's Motion To Set Aside Void Judgment [Ccp 473(D)]; Or In The Alternative To Vacate Judgment Based On Extrinsic Fraud. Hare's motion and petition are DENIED. Hare's request for an "evidentiary hearing" is also DENIED, as she has already submitted two lengthy declarations, which the Court has read. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Caroline McCormick, Esq., (916-254-5300), SPECIALLY APPEARING for Less & Weaver, Plaintiff.
No other appearance.

No argments heard. Plaintiff's counsel did not comply with Rule 3.1308. Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Sale Of Dwelling is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Judgment Creditor to prepare order approved as to form. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
